title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 234.110 - Counties may issue bonds
text:
234.110.  Counties may issue bonds. — After filing of such report as provided in section 234.100 the county commission, with such city or the proper authorities thereof, may make, or cause to be made, a contract for the purchase of such right-of-way and such counties may issue bonds for such purpose, as authorized by the general law governing the issuance of bonds by counties.
(RSMo 1939 § 8554, A.L. 1945 p. 1477) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7910; 1919 § 10698
